text.title: Sentry Supabase Vercel Wiring Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing inputs, the filled artefact, and the validator pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo founder on Next.js 14 + Supabase + Vercel. First incident lands; stack trace is minified, JWT leaks to Sentry. Operator runs the wiring procedure end-to-end; second incident lands with clean trace, scrubbed payload, classified RLS errors.

list.item: Vercel project linked to the GitHub repo.
Next.js 14 codebase using App Router + middleware.

section.title: Filled artefact (excerpt)
Validator trace
section.p: Running `python3 scripts/validate-sentry-supabase-vercel-wiring.py --file out.json` exits 0; running with the bad example exits 1 and prints VIOLATION lines per missing required field. `--self-test` exits 0 on both built-in fixtures.
